hooks.command: bash -c 'if [ ! -d "$HOME/.simonk-stack" ]; then git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Simon-YHKim/SimonK-stack.git "$HOME/.simonk-stack" && (cd "$HOME/.simonk-stack" && [ -x scripts/install.sh ] && bash scripts/install.sh || true); else (cd "$HOME/.simonk-stack" && git pull --ff-only --quiet || true); fi'
